languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

languages.text: "Ваша идея имела бы смысл, если бы здесь работал хоть один вокс-приемник. Без связи невозможно навести орудия достаточно точно, чтобы получить хоть сколько-то удовлетворительный результат".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

"Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

"Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

languages.text: 「もしここに1台でもヴォクス受信機が稼働していれば、君のアイデアは有意義なものになるだろう。しかし通信手段がない以上、満足のいく結果を得るために、艦砲を正確に照準することは不可能だ」
languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

traits.locale_text: 「もしここに1台でもvox受信機が稼働していれば、君のアイデアは有意義なものになるだろう。しかし通信手段がない以上、満足のいく結果を得るために、艦砲を正確に照準することは不可能だ。」

languages.text: « Votre idée aurait du mérite s'il y avait le moindre récepteur-vox en état de marche dans les environs. Sans dispositif de communication, il sera impossible de viser avec une précision suffisante pour obtenir un résultat satisfaisant. »
languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

traits.locale_text: « Votre idée aurait du mérite s'il y avait le moindre récepteur-vox en état de marche dans les environs. Sans dispositif de communication, il sera impossible de viser avec une précision suffisante pour obtenir un résultat satisfaisant. »

languages.text: "Eure Idee hätte etwas, wenn es hier auch nur einen funktionierenden Vox-Empfänger gäbe. Ohne Kommunikation ist es unmöglich, die Geschütze des Schiffs präzise genug auszurichten, um ein zufriedenstellendes Ergebnis zu erzielen."
languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Idee hätte etwas, wenn es hier auch nur einen funktionierenden Vox-Empfänger gäbe. Ohne Kommunikation ist es unmöglich, die Geschütze des Schiffs präzise genug auszurichten, um ein zufriedenstellendes Ergebnis zu erzielen."

languages.text: "Burada çalışan tek bir voks alıcısı olsaydı fikrin değerli olabilirdi. İletişim olmadan geminin toplarını tatmin edici bir sonuç elde edecek kadar isabetli nişanlamak imkânsız olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

traits.locale_text: "Burada çalışan tek bir voks alıcısı olsaydı fikrin değerli olabilirdi. İletişim olmadan geminin toplarını tatmin edici bir sonuç elde edecek kadar isabetli nişanlamak imkânsız olacaktır."

languages.text: «Su idea sería viable si aquí hubiese un solo receptor de voco operativo. Sin comunicaciones, será imposible apuntar los cañones de la nave con la precisión necesaria para garantizar un resultado mínimamente satisfactorio».
languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."

traits.locale_text: «Su idea sería viable si aquí hubiese un solo receptor de voco operativo. Sin comunicaciones, será imposible apuntar los cañones de la nave con la precisión necesaria para garantizar un resultado mínimamente satisfactorio».

languages.text: “如果这里哪怕有一台能用的音阵接收器，你的建议或许都能付诸实践。没有通讯支持，舰炮就无法精确锁定目标，最终效果恐怕不会让人满意。”
languages.original_text: "Your idea would have merit were there even one working vox-receiver here. Without communications, it will be impossible to aim the ship's guns accurately enough to achieve a result that is in any way satisfactory."
